models.notes: Preferred operating visit-level model from the p101 cross-validation suite. Fold 01 is the ship candidate because it had the best validation balanced accuracy among EfficientNetV2-S MIL full checkpoints.
models.notes_ko: p101 교차검증 suite에서 선택한 운영용 visit-level 모델입니다. EfficientNetV2-S MIL full 체크포인트 중 validation balanced accuracy가 가장 높았던 fold 01을 배포 후보로 사용합니다.
models.notes_en: Preferred operating visit-level model from the p101 cross-validation suite. Fold 01 is the ship candidate because it had the best validation balanced accuracy among EfficientNetV2-S MIL full checkpoints.

models.notes: Preferred image-level companion CNN from the p101 cross-validation suite. Fold 01 is bundled as the representative ConvNeXt-Tiny support model.
models.notes_ko: p101 교차검증 suite에서 선택한 image-level 보조 CNN입니다. 대표 ConvNeXt-Tiny support 모델로 fold 01을 함께 제공합니다.
models.notes_en: Preferred image-level companion CNN from the p101 cross-validation suite. Fold 01 is bundled as the representative ConvNeXt-Tiny support model.
